name: Gyros
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic cloves, thyme, oregano, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Place the lamb strips in the marinade and coat well. Cover and chill for 4 to 6 hours or overnight, turning several times.
3. To make the gyro, place the meat, lettuce, diced or thinly sliced tomato, thinly sliced onion, and crumbled feta cheese in the middle of a pita bread.
4. Top with tzatziki (yogurt and cucumber sauce) and fold or wrap the pita around the meat and vegetables.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired before serving.
